title: stonemultitool
body:
The Stonemultitool is a versatile instrument that integrates a pickaxe, axe, shovel, hoe, and sword, and can transform into an entity called "Golem" to assist players in combating monsters. It notably grants the player the ability to attack monsters with the right-click, ensuring that the Stonemultitool has powerful digging capabilities without the risk of mistakenly mining blocks while targeting monsters.

The recipe for the Stonemultitool consists of a stone pickaxe, axe, shovel, hoe, sword, and two stones.(No fixed order)

The specific usage methods of the Stonemultitool are as follows (all apply when the Stonemultitool is the item in the main hand):

1.When the current health is greater than or equal to half of the maximum health, right-clicking to attack will deal damage as a percentage of the maximum health to both the target and oneself. When the current health is less than half of the maximum health, right-clicking to attack will have a lifesteal effect.

2.Press the "V" key to transform the Stonemultitool into Golem.

3.Press the "B" key to instantly return to the spawn point, regardless of the dimension the player is in.(At the cost of half of maximum health)

4.Press the "C" key to teleport to the nearest Golem within the same dimension.

5.Press the "O" key to open a GUI that allows the destruction of unwanted items.

6.Press the "X" key to vertically teleport the player to a location above their head that can accommodate them.(At the cost of half of maximum health)

7.When left-clicking to break blocks, if the armour value is less than or equal to 15, it simultaneously breaks the target block and the surrounding 8 blocks; if the armour value is greater than 15, it has the effect of Silk Touch.

8.Right-clicking on dirt or grass blocks turns them into farmland blocks ready for cultivation.

9.Right-clicking on a block causes any fluid block above the target block to disappear.

10.When the player is attacked, the source of damage will be teleported to the front of the player.

11.Right-clicking on the ground will clear nearby weeds.

12.When the off-hand item is a compass, the current coordinates will automatically display above the inventory.

13.When the block in front and below the target is air, and the player has the same block in their inventory, right-clicking on the target block will automatically place the block forward.

Tip: When the item in the main hand is not a Stonemultitool, right-clicking on Golem will transform it into a Stonemultitool.
